docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $208.00 FILED BY HAYES, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT R.C. REFRIGERATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT R.C. REFRIGERATION $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
